subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! It is eventide, and the spiritual friends, both pilgrims and residents, are setting forth to visit the Sacred Shrine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء عصر است و یاران روحانی از مسافرین و مجاورین عازم زیارت
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Manifestation of God as sun, @growth of the Cause
